meaning: n.发育营养正常促进剂adj.富营养的,发育营养正常的
examples: Lake Nanhu is in serious eutrophic state, and needs to take measures to prevent the water quality from worsening further.
Using enclosure ecosystem bags, the control of algal overgrowth with chemical methods is studied in eutrophic Chaohu Lake.
And eutrophic state of five major lakes in our country were studied with more satisfactory result compared with other methods.
